parameter.label: XSETOR : singleList:Text
parameter.expression: SELECT to_char(w.valor, 'FM00') AS VALUE, w.opcao AS label FROM tddopc w WHERE w.valor IN (01, 03, 04, 05, 06, 07, 08, 10, 11, 13, 15, 16, 17, 23) AND w.nucampo = (SELECT DISTINCT z.nucampo FROM tddopc z WHERE z. nucampo = (SELECT nucampo FROM tddcam WHERE nometab = 'TGFPRO' AND nomecampo = 'AD_SET_PRODUCAO')) ORDER BY to_char(w.valor, 'FM00')

simple-value.expression: SELECT b.xdt, b.mes_ano, a.codset, a.descset FROM (SELECT to_char(w.valor, 'FM00') AS codset, w.opcao AS descset FROM tddopc w WHERE w.nucampo = 9999990191 AND to_char(w.valor, 'FM00') = :XSETOR ORDER BY to_char(w.valor, 'FM00')) a CROSS JOIN (SELECT :xdt AS xdt, upper(REPLACE(to_char(:XDT, 'Month/YYYY'), ' ', '')) AS mes_ano FROM dual) b

chart.title: % EFICIÊNCIA (MENSAL)
chart.expression: SELECT 1 AS ordem, to_char(dhapo, 'YYYY') AS anomes, 'ANO' AS mesano, SUM(meta) AS meta, SUM(qtd) AS qtd, CASE WHEN SUM(meta) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (SUM(qtd) / SUM(meta)) * 100 END AS perc FROM (SELECT trunc(apo.dhapo) AS dhapo, SUM(apf.qtd) AS qtd, SUM(apf.qtd * pso.qtdmistura01) AS kg, SUM(apf.qtd * pro.ad_golpes) AS golpe, coalesce((SELECT mpc.meta FROM ad_metapcp mpc WHERE mpc.dataprod = trunc(apo.dhapo) AND to_char(mpc.setor, 'FM00') = :XSETOR), 0) AS meta FROM tpriproc ord INNER JOIN tpriatv atv ON ord.idiproc = atv.idiproc INNER JOIN tpripa ipa ON atv.idiproc = ipa.idiproc INNER JOIN tprapo apo ON atv.idiatv = apo.idiatv INNER JOIN tprapf apf ON apo.nuapo = apf.nuapo INNER JOIN tgfpro pro ON ipa.codprodpa = pro.codprod LEFT JOIN (SELECT d.idefx, a.codprod, d.codvol, d.qtdmistura AS qtdmistura01 FROM tgfpro a INNER JOIN tgfgru b ON a.codgrupoprod = b.codgrupoprod LEFT JOIN (SELECT d1.codprodpa, MAX(d1.idefx) idefx FROM tprlmp d1 GROUP BY d1.codprodpa) c ON a.codprod = c.codprodpa LEFT JOIN tprlmp d ON c.codprodpa = d.codprodpa AND c.idefx = d.idefx LEFT JOIN tgfpro e ON d.codprodmp = e.codprod LEFT JOIN tgfvoa f ON d.codprodmp = f.codprod AND d.codvol = f.codvol) pso ON ipa.codprodpa = pso.codprod WHERE to_char(apo.dhapo, 'YYYY') = to_char(:XDT, 'YYYY') AND to_char(pro.ad_set_producao, 'FM00') = :XSETOR GROUP BY trunc(apo.dhapo)) GROUP BY to_char(dhapo, 'YYYY') UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ordem, NULL AS anomes, NULL AS mesano, NULL AS meta, NULL AS qtd, NULL AS perc FROM dual UNION ALL (SELECT 3 AS ordem, ano.anomes, ano.mesano, coalesce(orp.meta, 0) AS meta, coalesce(orp.qtd, 0) AS qtd, CASE WHEN coalesce(orp.meta, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (coalesce(orp.qtd, 0) / coalesce(orp.meta, 0)) * 100 END AS perc FROM (SELECT to_char(:XDT, 'YYYY') || to_char(LEVEL, 'FM00') AS anomes, to_char(to_date(LEVEL, 'MM'), 'MON') AS mesano FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12) ano LEFT JOIN (SELECT to_char(dhapo, 'YYYYMM') AS anomes, SUM(meta) AS meta, SUM(qtd) AS qtd FROM (SELECT trunc(apo.dhapo) AS dhapo, SUM(apf.qtd) AS qtd, SUM(apf.qtd * pso.qtdmistura01) AS kg, SUM(apf.qtd * pro.ad_golpes) AS golpe, coalesce((SELECT mpc.meta FROM ad_metapcp mpc WHERE mpc.dataprod = trunc(apo.dhapo) AND mpc.setor = 1), 0) AS meta FROM tpriproc ord INNER JOIN tpriatv atv ON ord.idiproc = atv.idiproc INNER JOIN tpripa ipa ON atv.idiproc = ipa.idiproc INNER JOIN tprapo apo ON atv.idiatv = apo.idiatv INNER JOIN tprapf apf ON apo.nuapo = apf.nuapo INNER JOIN tgfpro pro ON ipa.codprodpa = pro.codprod LEFT JOIN (SELECT d.idefx, a.codprod, d.codvol, d.qtdmistura AS qtdmistura01 FROM tgfpro a INNER JOIN tgfgru b ON a.codgrupoprod = b.codgrupoprod LEFT JOIN (SELECT d1.codprodpa, MAX(d1.idefx) idefx FROM tprlmp d1 GROUP BY d1.codprodpa) c ON a.codprod = c.codprodpa LEFT JOIN tprlmp d ON c.codprodpa = d.codprodpa AND c.idefx = d.idefx LEFT JOIN tgfpro e ON d.codprodmp = e.codprod LEFT JOIN tgfvoa f ON d.codprodmp = f.codprod AND d.codvol = f.codvol) pso ON ipa.codprodpa = pso.codprod WHERE to_char(apo.dhapo, 'YYYY') = to_char(:XDT, 'YYYY') AND to_char(pro.ad_set_producao, 'FM00') = :XSETOR GROUP BY trunc(apo.dhapo)) GROUP BY to_char(dhapo, 'YYYYMM')) orp ON ano.anomes = orp.anomes) ORDER BY ordem, anomes

chart.title: QTD PRODUZIDA - SEMANA MÉDIA
chart.expression: SELECT iw, to_char(rownum, 'FM9') || 'ª SEM' AS i, CASE WHEN d = 0 THEN 0 ELSE qtd / d END AS qtd FROM (SELECT iw, coalesce(orp.qtd, 0) AS qtd, coalesce(orp.d, 0) AS d FROM (SELECT iw FROM (SELECT DISTINCT to_char(last_day(add_months(:XDT, -1)) + LEVEL, 'IW') AS iw FROM dual WHERE to_char(last_day(add_months(:XDT, -1)) + LEVEL, 'D') IN (2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7) CONNECT BY LEVEL <= to_number(to_char(last_day(:XDT), 'DD')))) sem LEFT JOIN (SELECT semana, d, SUM(qtd) AS qtd, SUM(kg) AS kg, SUM(golpe) AS golpe FROM (SELECT ord.idiproc, atv.idiatv, atv.idiproc, apo.nuapo, apo.idiatv, COUNT(DISTINCT trunc(apo.dhapo)) over (PARTITION BY to_char(apo.dhapo, 'IW')) AS d, to_char(apo.dhapo, 'IW') AS semana, apo.codusu, apo.observacao, apo.situacao, apo.ad_dhinicio, apo.ad_dhfinal, apo.ad_qtdpessoas, apo.ad_turno, ipa.codprodpa, (pro.descrprod || pro.compldesc) AS descproduto, apf.qtd, pso.qtdmistura01, (apf.qtd * pso.qtdmistura01) AS kg, (apf.qtd * pro.ad_golpes) AS golpe FROM tpriproc ord INNER JOIN tpriatv atv ON ord.idiproc = atv.idiproc INNER JOIN tpripa ipa ON atv.idiproc = ipa.idiproc INNER JOIN tprapo apo ON atv.idiatv = apo.idiatv INNER JOIN tprapf apf ON apo.nuapo = apf.nuapo INNER JOIN tgfpro pro ON ipa.codprodpa = pro.codprod LEFT JOIN (SELECT d.idefx, a.codprod, d.codvol, d.qtdmistura AS qtdmistura01 FROM tgfpro a INNER JOIN tgfgru b ON a.codgrupoprod = b.codgrupoprod LEFT JOIN (SELECT d1.codprodpa, MAX(d1.idefx) idefx FROM tprlmp d1 GROUP BY d1.codprodpa) c ON a.codprod = c.codprodpa LEFT JOIN tprlmp d ON c.codprodpa = d.codprodpa AND c.idefx = d.idefx LEFT JOIN tgfpro e ON d.codprodmp = e.codprod LEFT JOIN tgfvoa f ON d.codprodmp = f.codprod AND d.codvol = f.codvol) pso ON ipa.codprodpa = pso.codprod WHERE trunc(apo.dhapo) BETWEEN (last_day(add_months(:XDT, -1)) + 1) AND last_day(:XDT) AND to_char(pro.ad_set_producao, 'FM00') = :XSETOR) GROUP BY semana, d ORDER BY semana) orp ON sem.iw = orp.semana ORDER BY iw)

chart.title: QUANTIDADE DIARIA
chart.expression: SELECT mes.dia AS d, coalesce(orp.qtd, 0) AS qtd FROM (SELECT dd AS d, dia FROM (SELECT dd, dd || '-' || dy AS dia FROM (SELECT DISTINCT to_char(last_day(add_months(:XDT, -1)) + LEVEL, 'DD') AS dd, to_char(last_day(add_months(:XDT, -1)) + LEVEL, 'DY') AS dy FROM dual WHERE to_char(last_day(add_months(:XDT, -1)) + LEVEL, 'D') IN (2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7) CONNECT BY LEVEL <= to_number(to_char(last_day(:XDT), 'DD')) ORDER BY to_char(last_day(add_months(:XDT, -1)) + LEVEL, 'DD')))) mes LEFT JOIN (SELECT dia, SUM(qtd) AS qtd, SUM(kg) AS kg, SUM(golpe) AS golpe FROM (SELECT ord.idiproc, atv.idiatv, atv.idiproc, apo.nuapo, apo.idiatv, to_char(apo.dhapo, 'DD') AS dia, apo.codusu, apo.observacao, apo.situacao, apo.ad_dhinicio, apo.ad_dhfinal, apo.ad_qtdpessoas, apo.ad_turno, ipa.codprodpa, (pro.descrprod || pro.compldesc) AS descproduto, apf.qtd, pso.qtdmistura01, (apf.qtd * pso.qtdmistura01) AS kg, (apf.qtd * pro.ad_golpes) AS golpe FROM tpriproc ord INNER JOIN tpriatv atv ON ord.idiproc = atv.idiproc INNER JOIN tpripa ipa ON atv.idiproc = ipa.idiproc INNER JOIN tprapo apo ON atv.idiatv = apo.idiatv INNER JOIN tprapf apf ON apo.nuapo = apf.nuapo INNER JOIN tgfpro pro ON ipa.codprodpa = pro.codprod LEFT JOIN (SELECT d.idefx, a.codprod, d.codvol, d.qtdmistura AS qtdmistura01 FROM tgfpro a INNER JOIN tgfgru b ON a.codgrupoprod = b.codgrupoprod LEFT JOIN (SELECT d1.codprodpa, MAX(d1.idefx) idefx FROM tprlmp d1 GROUP BY d1.codprodpa) c ON a.codprod = c.codprodpa LEFT JOIN tprlmp d ON c.codprodpa = d.codprodpa AND c.idefx = d.idefx LEFT JOIN tgfpro e ON d.codprodmp = e.codprod LEFT JOIN tgfvoa f ON d.codprodmp = f.codprod AND d.codvol = f.codvol) pso ON ipa.codprodpa = pso.codprod WHERE trunc(apo.dhapo) BETWEEN (last_day(add_months(:XDT, -1)) + 1) AND last_day(:XDT) AND to_char(pro.ad_set_producao, 'FM00') = :XSETOR) GROUP BY dia ORDER BY dia) orp ON mes.d = orp.dia ORDER BY mes.d

chart.title: QUALIDADE
chart.expression: WITH base AS (SELECT coalesce(qld.qtdreprovada, 0) AS qtdreprovado, coalesce(qld.qtdretida, 0) AS qtdretido, coalesce(qld.qtdnotificada, 0) AS qtdnotificado FROM ad_qualihaiala qld INNER JOIN tpriatv atv ON qld.idiproc = atv.idiproc INNER JOIN tpripa ipa ON qld.idiproc = ipa.idiproc INNER JOIN tgfpro pro ON ipa.codprodpa = pro.codprod INNER JOIN tprapo apo ON atv.idiatv = apo.idiatv WHERE trunc(apo.dhapo) BETWEEN (last_day(add_months(:XDT, -1)) + 1) AND last_day(:XDT) AND (coalesce(qld.qtdreprovada, 0) + coalesce(qld.qtdretida, 0) + coalesce(qld.qtdnotificada, 0)) > 0 AND to_char(coalesce(qld.setor_def, pro.ad_set_producao), 'FM00') = :XSETOR), tipos AS (SELECT 'REPROVADO' AS tipo FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'RETIDO' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'NOTIFICADO' FROM dual) SELECT t.tipo, coalesce(SUM(val.valor), 0) AS vlr FROM tipos t LEFT JOIN (SELECT tipo, valor FROM base unpivot(valor FOR tipo IN(qtdreprovado AS 'REPROVADO', qtdretido AS 'RETIDO', qtdnotificado AS 'NOTIFICADO'))) val ON t.tipo = val.tipo GROUP BY t.tipo

grid.title: OCORRÊNCIAS OP
grid.expression: SELECT a.codmtp, a.descricao, coalesce(b.freq, 0) AS freq, lpad(coalesce(b.tempo, '0h:00m'), 8, ' ') AS tempo, coalesce(b.percentual, 0) AS percentual FROM (SELECT codmtp, initcap(descricao) AS descricao FROM (SELECT mtp.codmtp, coalesce(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(mtp.descricao, ' DE MÁQUINA / FERRAMENTA / GABARITO', ''), ' NO ', ' '), ' DE ', ' '), 'TOTAIS') AS descricao FROM tprmtp mtp UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS codmtmp, 'TOTAL ' AS descricao FROM dual) ORDER BY codmtp) a LEFT JOIN (SELECT coalesce(cnc.codmtp, 10) AS codmtp, COUNT(cnc.codmtp) AS freq, to_char(trunc(SUM((cnc.dtfinal - cnc.dtinicio) * 24)), 'FM9990') || 'h:' || to_char(trunc(MOD(SUM((cnc.dtfinal - cnc.dtinicio) * 24 * 60), 60)), 'FM00') || 'm' AS tempo, (round((SUM((cnc.dtfinal - cnc.dtinicio) * 24) / SUM(SUM((cnc.dtfinal - cnc.dtinicio) * 24)) over()) * 100, 2) * 2) AS percentual FROM ad_cnc cnc LEFT JOIN tpriatv atv ON cnc.idiproc = atv.idiproc LEFT JOIN tpripa ipa ON cnc.idiproc = ipa.idiproc LEFT JOIN tgfpro pro ON ipa.codprodpa = pro.codprod LEFT JOIN tprapo apo ON atv.idiatv = apo.idiatv WHERE trunc(apo.dhapo) BETWEEN (last_day(add_months(:XDT, -1)) + 1) AND last_day(:XDT) AND to_char(pro.ad_set_producao, 'FM00') = :XSETOR GROUP BY ROLLUP(cnc.codmtp)) b ON a.codmtp = b.codmtp ORDER BY a.codmtp

grid.title: MANUTENÇÃO (Ordens de Serviços)
grid.expression: SELECT valor, opcao, corretiva, preventiva, programada, melhorias, total FROM (SELECT valor, coalesce(opcao, 'Total Geral') AS opcao, SUM(corretiva_o) AS corretiva, SUM(preventiva_o) AS preventiva, SUM(programada_o) AS programada, SUM(melhorias_o) AS melhorias, SUM(coalesce(corretiva_o, 0) + coalesce(preventiva_o, 0) + coalesce(programada_o, 0) + coalesce(melhorias_o, 0)) AS total FROM (SELECT tp.valor, tp.opcao, pt.statusordemservico, pt.stordemservico, pt.codtpmanutencao, q FROM (SELECT w.valor, w.opcao FROM tddopc w WHERE w.nucampo = (SELECT DISTINCT z.nucampo FROM tddopc z WHERE z. nucampo = (SELECT nucampo FROM tddcam WHERE nometab = 'AD_MCABOS' AND nomecampo = 'STATUSORDEMSERVICO')) ORDER BY w.nucampo, w.ordem) tp LEFT JOIN (SELECT mos.statusordemservico, option_label('AD_MCABOS', 'STATUSORDEMSERVICO', mos.statusordemservico) AS stordemservico, mos.codsetor, mse.setdescricao, coalesce(mos.tpmanutencao, 1) AS codtpmanutencao, mos.osnum, 1 q FROM ad_mcabos mos INNER JOIN ad_msetor mse ON mos.codsetor = mse.codsetor WHERE mos.codsetor = (SELECT codsetor FROM (SELECT x.codsetor, translate(x.setdescricao, 'ÇÃÍÁ', 'CAIA') AS setdescricao FROM ad_msetor x) WHERE setdescricao = (SELECT w.opcao FROM tddopc w WHERE w.nucampo = 9999990191 AND to_char(w.valor, 'FM00') = :XSETOR)) AND trunc(mos.dtos) BETWEEN (last_day(add_months(:XDT, -1)) + 1) AND last_day(:XDT)) pt ON tp.valor = pt.statusordemservico) pivot(SUM(q) AS o FOR codtpmanutencao IN(1 AS corretiva, 2 AS preventiva, 3 AS programada, 4 AS melhorias)) GROUP BY ROLLUP((valor, opcao)) ORDER BY valor) WHERE valor IS NOT NULL

simple-value.title: ROTINAS NO SETOR
simple-value.value-expression:
Orientação Time
DDS e DDQ
Treinamento
Abastecimento D-1
Inspeção Pontos Críticos
Feedback Individual
Controle Hora a Hora
Premiação
Plano de Produção
Segregação Diária
Pontos Manutenção
Prioridades Produção

grid.title: RANKING DE O.S. (Equipamentos)
grid.expression: SELECT descritem, mes, ano FROM (SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(descritem, '<', ''), '>', '') AS descritem, COUNT(qtdosmes) AS mes, COUNT(qtdosano) AS ano FROM (SELECT mit.descmaquina AS descritem, CASE WHEN trunc(mos.dtos) BETWEEN (last_day(add_months(to_date(to_char(:XDT,'DD/MM/YYYY'),'DD/MM/YYYY'), -1)) + 1) AND last_day(:XDT) THEN mos.coditem ELSE NULL END AS qtdosmes, mos.coditem AS qtdosano FROM ad_mcabos mos INNER JOIN ad_msetor mse ON mos.codsetor = mse.codsetor INNER JOIN ad_mitens mit ON mos.coditem = mit.coditem WHERE mos.codsetor = (SELECT codsetor FROM (SELECT x.codsetor, translate(x.setdescricao, 'ÇÃÍÁ', 'CAIA') AS setdescricao FROM ad_msetor x) WHERE setdescricao = (SELECT w.opcao FROM tddopc w WHERE w.nucampo = 9999990191 AND to_char(w.valor, 'FM00') = :XSETOR)) AND to_char(mos.dtos, 'YYYY') = to_char(:XDT, 'YYYY')) GROUP BY descritem) WHERE mes > 0 ORDER BY mes DESC

grid.title: DESPERDÍCIOS/PERDAS
grid.expression: SELECT origem_defeito, codprod, descprod, codvol, custo, qtd, total FROM (SELECT origem_defeito, codprod, descprod, codvol, CASE WHEN SUM(saiqtdneg + entqtdneg) <> 0 THEN (SUM(saicustotal + entcustotal) / SUM(saiqtdneg + entqtdneg)) ELSE 0 END AS custo, SUM(saiqtdneg + entqtdneg) AS qtd, SUM(saicustotal + entcustotal) AS total FROM (SELECT origem_defeito, codprod, descprod, codvol, vlrcus, CASE WHEN atualestoque < 0 THEN qtdneg ELSE 0 END AS saiqtdneg, CASE WHEN atualestoque < 0 THEN (qtdneg * vlrcus) ELSE 0 END AS saicustotal, CASE WHEN atualestoque > 0 THEN qtdneg ELSE 0 END AS entqtdneg, CASE WHEN atualestoque > 0 THEN (qtdneg * vlrcus) ELSE 0 END AS entcustotal FROM (SELECT nvl(ite.ad_origem_defeito, 0) origem_defeito, option_label('TGFITE', 'AD_ORIGEM_DEFEITO', ite.ad_origem_defeito) AS origem, cab.dtneg, cab.nunota, cab.codtipoper, gru.codgrupoprod, CASE WHEN substr(gru.codgrupoprod, 1, 1) = 4 AND ite.atualestoque = 1 THEN 0 ELSE ite.atualestoque END AS atualestoque, (SELECT g.descrgrupoprod FROM tgfgru g WHERE substr(g.codgrupoprod, 1, 3) = substr(gru.codgrupoprod, 1, 3) AND g.grau = 2) descgrupoprod, ite.codprod, pro.descrprod || pro.compldesc AS descprod, pro.codvol, (ite.qtdneg * CASE WHEN substr(gru.codgrupoprod, 1, 1) = 4 AND ite.atualestoque = 1 THEN 0 ELSE ite.atualestoque END) AS qtdneg, (SELECT cussemicm FROM (SELECT rank() over (PARTITION BY cus.codprod ORDER BY cus.dtatual DESC) i, cus.codprod, cus.codemp, cus.dtatual, cus.codlocal, cus.controle, cus.cusmedicm, cus.cussemicm, cus.cusrep FROM tgfcus cus WHERE cus.codprod IN (ite.codprod) AND cus.dtatual <= cab.dtneg) WHERE i = 1) vlrcus FROM tgfcab cab INNER JOIN tgfite ite ON cab.nunota = ite.nunota INNER JOIN tgfpro pro ON ite.codprod = pro.codprod INNER JOIN tgfgru gru ON pro.codgrupoprod = gru.codgrupoprod WHERE cab.codtipoper IN (502, 503) AND cab.nunota NOT IN (63316) AND to_char(ite.ad_origem_defeito, 'FM00' ) = :XSETOR AND TO_CHAR(cab.dtneg, 'YYYYMM') = to_char(:XDT, 'YYYYMM'))) GROUP BY origem_defeito, codprod, descprod, codvol) WHERE QTD <> 0 ORDER BY codprod
